form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 515m at this track by 11 lengths in a Grade 4. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 29.39. Top chance.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (16.61) at this track in a Special conditions race, finishing fourth and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.
